subcodes.first_line: O friends of God! When the Star of the Covenant and the radiant Morn of the Testament shed their light upon the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دوستان یزدان کوکب پیمان و صبح نورانی میثاق آفاقه پرتونثار اولنجه گوزی
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @light and darkness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
